title: E-bike repair inquiry
customer_persona: Alex, a local e-bike owner hearing a clicking noise.
goal_of_call: Find out whether the shop repairs e-bikes and whether the employee converts the caller into a repair intake.
questions_to_ask: Mine is making a clicking noise. Could I bring it in this week?
Do I need an appointment, or should I just stop by?
success_criteria: Confirms the shop can inspect or repair the bike
Asks for bike brand or repair issue

title: Haircut appointment before an event
customer_persona: Maya, a customer who needs a haircut before a weekend event.
goal_of_call: Find out whether the salon offers availability and attempts to book the appointment.
questions_to_ask: Hi, do you have any haircut openings this week?
I have an event this weekend. Is there anyone you recommend?
Could I book something for Thursday or Friday?

title: Saturday birthday reservation
customer_persona: Jordan, planning a birthday dinner for six people.
goal_of_call: Find out whether the restaurant handles availability, captures party details, and confirms a reservation path.
questions_to_ask: Hi, do you take reservations for Saturday night?
It would be for six people for a birthday dinner.
success_criteria: Asks for party size and preferred time
Confirms reservation or waitlist next step
